hasOrder: You already have an order to pick up
goPickup: You received the location, go pick up the order
nothingHere: There is nothing here for you
droppedItems: You don't have enough space for all items. Items you can't carry are on the ground
removeTip: Right click to remove from cart
addTip: Left click to add to cart
restartSuccess: You have successfully restarted the player's XP
